title: evodianthus funifer subsp. trailianus
intro: Evodianthus funifer subsp. trailianus, also known as the Trail's Evodia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include aiding in the relief of fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Evodianhus funifer subsp. trailianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, allowing for various forms of use in traditional herbalism.
